Title: unhead: Streaming SSR `streamKey` injected into inline script without identifier validation
Description: `createStreamableHead({ streamKey })` interpolated its `streamKey` argument directly into the streaming SSR bootstrap and suspense-chunk inline scripts without identifier validation or escaping. If an application forwards untrusted data into that configuration value, the rendered scripts become a script-injection sink.
NotImpacted: All versions before 3.0.0-beta.5, all versions starting from 3.0.1
